creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As mrspock@esfm.ipn.mx wrote:

> Login classes have been defined in 2.2.2 release.
> The login process reports that "root" has no class defined.

That's a known problem mentioned in the errata.txt file.

cp /usr/src/etc/login.conf /etc

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
